title: BG11 hypersaline medium
steps: Add the following to a beaker and dissolve using a stir bar on a magnetic stir plate. %s %s BG11 medium amount unit initial water 968 ml NaCl 49.8 g NaNO3 1.5 g NaCO3 0.02 g Sodium silicate solution 244 µL Stock A 10 ml Stock B 10 ml Stock C 10 ml Stock 5 (trace metals) 1 ml Vitamins 1 ml
Filter sterilize near Bunsen burner or in sterile biohood.

STOCK SOLUTIONS %s %s Stock solutions Stock A Concentration (g/L) Na2MG EDTA 0.1 Ferric ammonium citrate 0.6 Citric acid*1H2O 0.6 CaCl2*2H2O 3.6 Add up to 1L of dH20 Stock B Concentration (g/L) MgSO4*7H2O 7.5 Add up to 1L of dH20 Stock C Concentration (g/L) K2HPO4*3H2O 4 Add up to 1L of dH20 Stock 5 Concentration (g/L) H3BO3 2.86 MnCl2*4H2O 1.81 ZnSO4*7H2O 0.222 CuSO4*5H2O 0.079 CoCl2*6H2O 0.05 NaMoO4*2H2O 0.391 Add up to 1L of dH20 %s %s Stock BConcentration (g/L)MgSO4*7H2O7.5Add up to 1L of dH20 Stock CConcentration (g/L)K2HPO4*3H2O4Add up to 1L of dH20 Stock 5Concentration (g/L)H3BO32.86MnCl2*4H2O1.81ZnSO4*7H2O0.222CuSO4*5H2O0.079CoCl2*6H2O0.05NaMoO4*2H2O0.391Add up to 1L of dH20 %s %s Stock CConcentration (g/L)K2HPO4*3H2O4Add up to 1L of dH20 Stock 5Concentration (g/L)H3BO32.86MnCl2*4H2O1.81ZnSO4*7H2O0.222CuSO4*5H2O0.079CoCl2*6H2O0.05NaMoO4*2H2O0.391Add up to 1L of dH20 %s %s Stock 5Concentration (g/L)H3BO32.86MnCl2*4H2O1.81ZnSO4*7H2O0.222CuSO4*5H2O0.079CoCl2*6H2O0.05NaMoO4*2H2O0.391Add up to 1L of dH20
Add Milli-Q water to bring total volume to 1 L.
